# CampusBoard

## About
CampusBoard is a free digital bulletin board and community platform built for university students in Turkey. Students can post listings, ask questions, comment on other students' listings, and connect with their campus community. Access requires a verified university email address, ensuring a trusted, student-only environment. Currently serving Istanbul Arel University, with expansion to additional universities planned.

## Website
https://campusboard.app

## Who It's For
- University students in Turkey looking to share or find resources
- Students who want to share lecture notes, summaries, or study materials
- Students searching for internship or part-time job opportunities
- Students looking for dormitory rooms or rental apartments near campus
- Students buying or selling second-hand items (books, laptops, electronics)
- Students organizing or discovering campus events and clubs

## Services and Features
- Free listing publication with category-based filtering
- Comments and Q&A system: open discussion under each listing; listing owner can reply
- Favorites: save listings for later access
- Category and faculty filtering
- University email verification: only verified students can register
- Mobile-friendly interface
- No ads, no subscriptions — completely free

## Categories
- Ders Notu (Lecture Notes): Notes, summaries, exam guides, PDFs, study materials
- Staj (Internship): Internship listings, part-time job opportunities
- Yurt / Kiralik Oda (Housing): Dormitory rooms, apartments, rentals near campus
- Ikinci El (Second-Hand): Books, laptops, phones, furniture and other used items
- Etkinlik (Events): Club events, workshops, social gatherings
- Genel (General): Other student listings that don't fit above categories

## Pricing
- Completely free
- No ads
- No subscription required

## Location
Turkey — currently serving Istanbul Arel University (Buyukcekmece and Mahmutbey campuses). Expansion to other Turkish universities is in progress.

## Contact
Website: https://campusboard.app
Register: https://campusboard.app/register
Login: https://campusboard.app/login

## Key Facts
- Student-only platform: university email verification required
- Free and unlimited listings
- Turkish-language interface
- Works on mobile and desktop
- Direct student-to-student communication
- Privacy-focused: listing owner's email is never exposed publicly

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is CampusBoard?**
CampusBoard is a free digital bulletin board for university students in Turkey where they can post listings, ask questions, and connect with their campus community.

**What types of listings can students post?**
Students can post lecture notes, internship opportunities, housing listings, second-hand items, campus events, and general announcements.

**Is CampusBoard free to use?**
Yes, completely free. There are no ads or subscription fees.

**How do I register on CampusBoard?**
Go to campusboard.app/register and sign up with your university email address. A verification email will be sent to confirm your account.

**Which universities does CampusBoard support?**
CampusBoard currently serves Istanbul Arel University students. Support for additional Turkish universities is being developed.

**Can students from other universities use CampusBoard?**
Currently, access is limited to universities supported by the platform. New universities are being added over time.

**How do I ask a question about a listing?**
Open the listing detail page and write your question in the comments/Q&A section. The listing owner will be notified and can reply.

**Is there a mobile app?**
CampusBoard is fully mobile-optimized and works directly in your browser at campusboard.app. No app download required.

**How is CampusBoard different from general classifieds sites?**
CampusBoard is exclusively for university students with verified university email addresses. This creates a trusted, spam-free community focused entirely on student needs — study materials, campus housing, internships, and more.

## What Makes CampusBoard Different
Unlike general classifieds platforms (such as Sahibinden or Facebook Marketplace), CampusBoard is built specifically for university students. University email verification eliminates spam and fake listings. Every user is a real, verified student. The platform focuses on student-specific needs: lecture notes, internships, campus housing, and student events — categories that general platforms do not serve well.
